name: Linguine with Olive-Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Chopped clams, packed in their own juice (6.5 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and butter in a skillet, add garlic and gently sauté for 1 minute over medium-low heat.
2. Mix in flour until blended. Remove from heat.
3. Drain clams, reserving the liquid.
4. Add milk to the reserved liquid to measure approximately 1-1/2 cups.
5. Gradually add the clams with their liquid to the butter mixture. Return to heat.
6. Stir until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
7. Stir in wine, olives, parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
8. Heat through thoroughly.
9. Serve over pasta.
